3225290.name: Spooky Dungeon
3225290.description:
Grab your spell book and return from the afterlife... the town needs you. Again.

Spooky Dungeon is a fast-paced, retro-style FPS dungeon crawler with a Halloween theme inspired by Heretic, Quake, Diablo, and the dark charm of 90s shooters.

ENTER THE DUNGEON

You and your talking Spell Book are brought back from the afterlife to stop skeletons, witches, pumpkins, and other Halloween horrors from destroying the town of Iseholt.

Delve into the dungeon and explore four unique realms. Fight hordes of enemies, dodge traps, defeat bosses, collect resources, and unlock spells, forbidden elixirs, powerful rings, and magical tattoos that reshape your fate.

Uncover the dark truth about the town and seal their fate. Break the cycle. Or embrace it.

GAME FEATURES

  • Retro FPS Aesthetic: A nostalgic visual style that captures the spirit of the 90s with modern refinements.

  • Halloween Theme: Immerse yourself in a whimsical Halloween-themed world filled with dark lore, mysterious characters, and chilling quests.

  • Procedurally Generated Levels: Every dungeon dive is unique. No two runs are the same.

  • Spell-Casting Combat: Unlock powerful spells to defeat the onslaught of monsters as you go deeper and deeper into the dungeon.

  • Challenging Enemies & Bosses: Skeletons, wraiths, golems and many more horrors await you, face a wide range of enemies lurking in the shadows. Confront terrifying bosses, each with unique abilities and strategies.

英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
